non_blocking_findings: LFG-P0 row statuses were stale after the phase-level status was marked pass; fixed by updating LFG-P0, LFG-P0.1, and LFG-P0.2 to pass.
Archive index DeepSeek evidence wording could be read as self-referential before the current review completed; no functional impact after this verdict was recorded.

scope.diff_summary: Archived the AI-governed risk closeout implementation plan into docs/governance/archive, kept the original path as an archive index, updated the skill contract and large-file plan to reference the archived state, and made the known-risk closeout runner tests independent of live-ledger open-risk count.
gates_reviewed: Archive index exists at the original required path and points to the preserved full plan.
Skill contract can still load required historical context through the original path.
Zero-open-risk dry-run produces no selected risks and keeps closeout_completed false.
Write mode remains rejected before mutation and fail-closed.
Large-file governance plan consistently records the archived closeout-plan state.

notes: DeepSeek bounded read-only review returned PASS with no blocking findings. The stale LFG-P0 status finding was fixed before final gates.
